title: Premium Creative. Real Brand. Real Product.
description: A short-form premium visual built with real brand-controlled assets.
hook: Here is what premium brand-controlled creative looks like in motion.
thumbnail_brief: Use the strongest premium product frame with clean focal contrast and readable title alignment.
cta: Watch more and explore the collection.

intelligence.trend_direction: Lead with immediate visual payoff and strong first-line hook.
intelligence.competitor_gap: Avoid slow intros. Front-load the value visually.
intelligence.audience_fit: Target mobile-first short-form viewers with low patience and high novelty response.

compliance_notes: Keep music and media usage rights-safe.
Do not rely on claimed third-party content for Shorts over one minute.
Use clear thumbnail-title alignment for standard videos.
Avoid misleading claims or deceptive packaging presentation.
